rulings.Case Title: GILBERT VS THE ALLIANCE (UNDER SEAL)
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Dismiss Plaintiff'S Action As A Sham & W/Out Merit Or In The Alternative, To Stay Proceedings; Request For Judicial Notice,
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO STAY ACTION GRANTED PENDING RESOLUTION OF APPEAL TO 9TH CIRCUIT. PLAINTIFF TO BRING COPY OF FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT TO HEARING. APPLICATION OF P. DAVID RICHARDSON TO APPEAR PRO HAC VICE GRANTED. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: RAMIREZ DEVELOPERS VS ROMAN CATHOLIC
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT FIDELITY AND GUARANTY INSURANCE CO.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF JERSEY CONSTRUCTOR'S CROSS-COMPLAINANT FOR CLAIM ON PERFORMANCE BOND AND EQUITABLE INDEMNITY GRANTED AS TO FIDELITY. GENERAL CONTRACTOR NOT NAMED IN BOND ACCORDINGLY NO LIABILITY BY SURETY TO GENERAL. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: SILVANIC VS THE REGENTS OF THE UC
rulings.Rulings: SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION EXCEPT CAUSE OF ACTION 6. DEMURRER TO CAUSE OF ACTION 6 SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. SEE CALIFORNIA MEDICAL ASSOCIATION, INC. V. UC REGENTS, (2000) 79 CAL.APP.4TH 542, 551. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: SHRAYBER VS. HOLIDAY HARBOR, INC.
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. COAST GUARD DECISION NOT TO REQUIRE PROPELLER GUARDS PREEMPTS CONTRARY STATE CLAIMS. FAILURE TO WARN CONTROLLED BY SAME PRINCIPLES SEE MOSS VS. OUTBOARD MARINE CORP. 915 F.SUPP. 183, 186 (1996). (PB)
